title: Turn
description: A single exchange in the session transcript (one player prompt or one DM response).

turn_id.description: Unique identifier for this turn, e.g. 'turn-001'.

text.description: Verbatim text of the turn. Never modify after creation.

source_optional.description: Optional source annotation (e.g. copy-paste origin, timestamp).

session_id.description: The session this turn belongs to, e.g. 'session-001'.

timestamp.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp when the turn was ingested.
